name: Rimini Street, Inc.
business: Rimini Street provides third-party enterprise software support, managed services, and Agentic AI ERP innovation solutions globally, serving over 3,100 active clients including 78 Fortune 500 companies and 20 Fortune Global 100 companies.

exposures.sentence: We have developed a proprietary operating model for enterprise software, the Rimini Smart Path, which applies a portfolio of solutions to transform how businesses support and optimize their software portfolio so they can innovate with new technologies, such as agentic artificial intelligence (AI).
Rimini Protect is our suite of proactive, fast, cost-effective and personalized software security services and solutions.

catalysts.event: Launch of Rimini Agentic UX solutions
catalysts.sentence: Introduced in December 2025, the goal of Rimini Agentic UX solutions is to combine AI-driven orchestration, automation and user experience (UX) design principles to deliver a unified, composable interface for enterprise workflows.

catalysts.event: Wind Down of support and services for Oracle PeopleSoft products to be completed
catalysts.sentence: Under the terms of this agreement, we are required to complete the Wind Down no later than by the end of the Wind Down Period (July 31, 2028).

catalysts.event: Repayment of $5.0 million on term loan principal
catalysts.sentence: On February 4, 2026, we repaid $5.0 million on our term loan principal balance.
